# Nettms Education

> Leading IT & Healthcare training institute in Ameerpet, Hyderabad, India.
> ISO Certified | Startup India Recognized | 500+ Students Placed | 85% Placement Rate

## About Nettms Education
Nettms Education is a top-rated IT and Healthcare training institute located in Ameerpet,
Hyderabad — the IT hub of India. Founded with the mission of bridging the skill gap between
education and industry, Nettms offers hands-on, job-ready courses taught by real-time
working professionals currently active in their respective industries.

- Phone: +91 9963384555
- Email: info@nettmsedu.in
- Website: https://nettmsedu.in
- Address: 504, Vamshi Estates, Opp. Value Zone Mall, Punjagutta Officers Colony, Ameerpet, Hyderabad — 500082

## Why Choose Nettms Education
- Trainers are real-time working professionals — not full-time teachers
- Live interactive classes (online + offline hybrid)
- Real project experience with portfolio building
- Full placement support — resume, mock interviews, LinkedIn, referrals
- ISO Certified quality management
- Startup India Government Recognized
- EMI available on all courses
- Free demo class available before enrolling
- Maximum batch size of 15 students for personalized attention

## IT Courses Offered

### Data Analysis Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 3 Months
- Fee: ₹30,000 (EMI: ₹10,000/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: K. Shiva — 6+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: Python, Pandas, NumPy, SQL, Power BI, DAX, ChatGPT, Claude, n8n
- Career Roles: Data Analyst, Business Analyst, MIS Analyst, BI Analyst
- Salary Range: ₹3.5 LPA – ₹8 LPA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/data-analysis

### Data Science Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 4 Months
- Fee: ₹30,000 (EMI: ₹10,000/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: K. Shiva — 6+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, AWS SageMaker
- Career Roles: Data Scientist, ML Engineer, AI Engineer, Deep Learning Engineer
- Salary Range: ₹5 LPA – ₹15 LPA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/data-science

### Multi-Cloud DevOps Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 3-4 Months
- Fee: ₹30,000 (EMI: ₹10,000/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: Ravi — 6+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, Prometheus, Grafana
- Career Roles: DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer, Platform Engineer
- Salary Range: ₹4.5 LPA – ₹12 LPA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/devops

### Full Stack Python Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 4-5 Months
- Fee: ₹30,000 (EMI: ₹10,000/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: K. Shiva — 6+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: Python, Django, React.js, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, AWS, Tailwind CSS
- Career Roles: Python Developer, Full Stack Developer, Backend Developer, Django Developer
- Salary Range: ₹3.5 LPA – ₹10 LPA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/python-fullstack

### Gen AI & Agentic AI Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 3 Months
- Fee: ₹30,000 (EMI: ₹10,000/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: Ravi — 5+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: Python, LangChain, LangGraph, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, HuggingFace, Pinecone, ChromaDB
- Career Roles: AI Engineer, Prompt Engineer, LLM Application Developer, Gen AI Consultant
- Salary Range: ₹6 LPA – ₹18 LPA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/gen-ai

## BIM (Building Information Modeling) Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
Nettms Education is one of the best BIM training institutes in Hyderabad for Civil,
Mechanical and ECE engineers. BIM is transforming the construction and engineering
industry in India and globally.

### BIM Course Details
- Duration: 3 Months
- Fee: ₹25,000 (EMI: ₹8,500/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: Vijayababu — 15+ years industry experience, actively working BIM professional
- Tools: Autodesk Revit, AutoCAD, Navisworks, BIM 360, Dynamo, Lumion, IFC Viewer
- Career Roles: BIM Modeler, BIM Coordinator, Revit Technician, CAD Designer, BIM Manager
- Salary Range: ₹3 LPA – ₹8 LPA (India) + International opportunities in UAE, UK, Australia, USA
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/bim

### BIM Course Curriculum
- AutoCAD Fundamentals — 2D drafting, annotation, layers, blocks
- Revit Architecture — interface, walls, floors, roofs, doors, windows, schedules
- Revit Structure & MEP — structural elements, MEP systems, family creation
- BIM Coordination — clash detection, Navisworks, IFC format, BIM 360
- BIM Standards & Workflow — LOD standards, BIM execution plans, project collaboration
- Capstone Project — complete building model, multi-discipline coordination

### Who Should Join BIM Course
- Civil engineering graduates
- Mechanical engineers
- Architecture graduates
- ECE professionals moving to infrastructure
- Anyone wanting international construction careers

### BIM Career Scope
- Government of India mandating BIM for all public projects
- High demand in Middle East (UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia)
- Growing demand in UK, Australia, USA
- Best course for civil engineers wanting high-paying jobs abroad

## Healthcare Course Offered

### Medical Coding Course — Ameerpet, Hyderabad
- Duration: 2-3 Months
- Fee: ₹15,000 (EMI: ₹5,200/month for 3 months)
- Trainer: Anusha — 3+ years industry experience, actively working professional
- Tools: ICD-10-CM Manual, CPT Manual, Encoder Pro, TruCode, AAPC Practice Tests
- Career Roles: Medical Coder, Clinical Documentation Specialist, Coding Auditor, Revenue Cycle Analyst
- Salary Range: ₹2.5 LPA – ₹6 LPA
- Work From Home: Yes — Medical Coding is one of the best WFH careers
- CPC Certification: Full preparation for AAPC CPC exam
- URL: https://nettmsedu.in/courses/medical-coding

- 500+ students trained and placed
- 85% overall placement rate
- ₹9.5 Lakhs highest package
- 50+ hiring partner companies

## Hiring Partners
TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Mphasis, Mindtree,
L&T, Apollo Hospitals, Omega Healthcare, Cognizant, IBM, Deloitte, KPMG

- Ravi Shankar — BIM Modeler at L&T Construction (placed within 1 month)
- Lakshmi Devi — Medical Coder at Omega Healthcare (work from home)
- Nikhil Reddy — AI Engineer at Deloitte (highest package in batch)
- Venkat Prasad — DevOps Engineer at Mphasis

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Nettms Education good for BIM training in Hyderabad?
Yes. Nettms Education is one of the best BIM training institutes in Hyderabad. The BIM
trainer Vijayababu has 15+ years of real industry experience and currently works on
large-scale infrastructure and construction projects.

### What is the fee for BIM course at Nettms Education?
The BIM course fee at Nettms Education is ₹25,000 with EMI option of ₹8,500 per month
for 3 months. Free demo class is available before enrolling.

### Does Nettms Education provide placement for BIM course?
Yes. Nettms Education provides full placement support for BIM students including resume
building, mock interviews, LinkedIn profile optimization and direct referrals to hiring partners.

### Which is the best IT training institute in Ameerpet Hyderabad?
Nettms Education is one of the top-rated IT training institutes in Ameerpet, Hyderabad.
ISO certified with 500+ students placed and 85% placement rate.

### Does Nettms offer online classes?
Yes. Nettms Education offers both online and offline (hybrid) classes for all courses.
Students across India can join online batches.

### What courses does Nettms Education offer?
Nettms Education offers 7 courses: Data Analysis, Data Science, Multi-Cloud DevOps,
Full Stack Python, Gen AI & Agentic AI, BIM (Building Information Modeling), and Medical Coding.
